zh-HK: 新增 line-no「向上／向下插入一行」操作（↑/↓）
修復拖放排序：主行移動時 Alt/Rec 子行會整組跟隨
插入「向下」會對齊到群組尾（避免打散主行與子行）
補齊事件路由 insert-row-above / insert-row-below
line-no 介面微調：行號與 ↑/↓ 分行顯示
en: Added line-no actions to insert row above/below (↑/↓)
Fixed drag-and-drop ordering: moving a parent row now moves Alt/Rec children as one group
Insert-below now anchors to group tail to avoid splitting parent/child blocks
Added action routing for insert-row-above / insert-row-below
line-no UI tweak: row number and ↑/↓ controls are displayed on separate lines
